title: Harmonizing Metadata Across Helmholtz Infrastructures
author: Brendike-Mannix, Oonagh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This report documents the methodology, findings, and   recommendations arising from the “Harmonizing Metadata Across Helmholtz Infrastructures”   kick-off workshop and an accompanying metadata gap analysis, both conducted as part of the   Helmholtz Metadata Collaboration (HMC)   program.
steps_raw: This report documents the methodology, findings, and   recommendations arising from the “Harmonizing Metadata Across Helmholtz Infrastructures”   kick-off workshop and an accompanying metadata gap analysis, both conducted as part of the   Helmholtz Metadata Collaboration (HMC)   program.
